name: tomat-extension-samples
description: A showcase of every capability a tomat extension can use, with one small single-purpose tool per capability for authors to learn from.

tools.name: sample_choice
tools.description: Demonstrate the choice question kind: a free-text prompt, a single-select, and a multiselect that also allows freeform input. Returns the collected answers.
triggers: demo asking the user some questions

tools.name: sample_diff
tools.description: Demonstrate the diff question kind: present a before/after change and report whether the user accepted it.

tools.name: sample_files
tools.description: Demonstrate the files question kind: offer a multiselect file picker with example entries and report which were chosen.

tools.name: sample_image
tools.description: Demonstrate the image question kind: show a sample image with keep and discard actions and report which action was chosen.

tools.name: sample_table
tools.description: Demonstrate the table question kind plus the private database: review some proposed rows, then save the accepted rows into the extension's database.

columns.description: Column headers for the table. Defaults to ["item", "amount"].

tools.name: sample_display
tools.description: Demonstrate the one-way display pushes: push one markdown, image, table, and diff bubble into the chat. Returns how many were pushed.

tools.name: sample_database
tools.description: Demonstrate the private database: upsert a key and value, then read it back. Shows the SQLite the extension's database flag provisions.

value.description: Value to store under the key. Defaults to "hello".

tools.name: sample_llm
tools.description: Demonstrate the llm capability: run a single completion against the user's configured model and return its text.

prompt.description: Prompt to complete. Defaults to a short hello.

llm.reason: Run a sample completion against the configured model

tools.name: sample_tts
tools.description: Demonstrate the tts capability: synthesize speech from text and report the audio format and size (not the audio itself).

text.description: Text to speak. Defaults to a short greeting.

tts.reason: Synthesize a short sample of speech from text

tools.name: sample_stt
tools.description: Demonstrate the stt capability: transcribe audio to text and return the transcript.

mime.description: MIME type of the audio, e.g. "audio/wav".

stt.reason: Transcribe a sample of audio to text

tools.name: sample_schedule
tools.description: Demonstrate scheduling: propose an interval scheduled prompt for the user to review, and report whether it was accepted.

everyMinutes.description: Minutes between runs for the proposed schedule. Defaults to 60.

tools.name: sample_memory
tools.description: Demonstrate the memories capability: list existing memories, write a sample memory, then read it back. Returns the titles seen and the stored content.

title.description: Title for the sample memory. Defaults to "Sample note".

memories.reason: List existing memories and read back the sample memory
